description: Vision-derived content tags per local image, keyed by <GalleryName>/<filename> (stable local-content identity, independent of Milovana IDs). Used to select images matching a script's subject/intensity. Tags are Claude's visual judgement and should be user-verified. Join with asset-map.json on the filename key to get the playable locator. See EOS-Tease-Authoring-Guide.md §5.3.

LeahGotti_001.themeNote: NOT a clean bucket: opens with two solo sensual shots then escalates to explicit partner sex. Illustrates why a real tease should split these into separate themed galleries (the partner shots are unusable anywhere a 'model alone' constraint applies, e.g. a tutorial).
